---
title: "Institutions"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("scripts/site_helpers.R")
meta <- read_meta()
```

The TU9 universities. Figures cover corresponding-author works published
**`r meta$oa_period_start`–`r meta$oa_period_end`**, shown three ways: the single
OpenAlex institution (ROR/OpenAlex), that institution grouped with its Leiden
`component` affiliates (OpenAlex/Leiden), and the same Leiden member set
restricted to CWTS Core sources (Leiden/Core). Select a university for its OA
share by year, OA-status composition, and snapshot history.

```{r}
#| echo: false
institutions_table(meta, path_prefix = "")
```
